sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26618" key="diecippa/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεξ-ιππάζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n26618.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ride out through,</tr_> dub. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διεξεπαίσατο</foreign> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διεκπαίω</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:5:16:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.16.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
